error.signature: Failed to install the following Android SDK packages as some licenses have not been accepted
error.regex: (Failed to install.*SDK packages|licenses have not been accepted|Android SDK.*not found|SDK location not found|ANDROID_HOME.*not set)

verdict.summary: Android SDK packages not installed or licenses not accepted. Common in CI/CD and fresh setups.

dead_ends.action: Download SDK packages manually from Google archives
dead_ends.why_fails: Manual downloads miss dependency packages and do not register licenses

dead_ends.action: Accept licenses interactively when running in CI
dead_ends.why_fails: CI has no interactive terminal. Licenses must be accepted non-interactively.

workarounds.action: Set ANDROID_HOME and install required packages
Use sdkmanager to install specific missing packages
